source.multipart_basis: The original sample already specifies body_count=assembly with 'pedestal with rebar cage sub-bodies'. Multipart decomposition formalizes the concrete pedestal body, rebar mats, stirrups, trunnion anchor bolts, and bearing sole plate as distinct part families.

full_prompt:
Design the SME CN10 Metallic Mineral Processing feed-end trunnion bearing pedestal for a 10.4 m x 5.2 m SAG mill as a multi-part assembly, explicitly modeling the 5.0 m x 4.0 m x 3.0 m reinforced concrete block as the physical collection of the concrete pedestal body, ASTM A615 Grade 60 rebar mats, stirrup/tie reinforcement, trunnion-bearing anchor bolt assemblies, and the bearing sole plate. The original prompt already calls out 'deliver STEP AP242 solid body of the pedestal with rebar cage sub-bodies'; this multipart sidecar formalizes that decomposition.

The assembly consists of five part families: (A) the concrete pedestal body, a rectangular 5.0 m long x 4.0 m wide x 3.0 m tall block of normal-weight reinforced concrete fc' 34.5 MPa; (B) longitudinal rebar mats in the top and bottom faces (and side faces for shrinkage/temperature), ASTM A615 Grade 60; (C) transverse stirrup/tie rebar that confines the longitudinal mat and provides shear reinforcement for the 6,130 kN bearing vertical reaction plus the 1,550 kN drive-torque horizontal reaction; (D) anchor-bolt assemblies at the trunnion bearing footprint that transmit bearing vertical/horizontal and dynamic reactions into the pedestal; (E) the bearing sole plate (steel plate or grouted leveling pad) that distributes the trunnion bearing base footprint load into the pedestal top.

Geometry inherits the original sample verbatim: pedestal 5.0 m x 4.0 m x 3.0 m, mill diameter 10.4 m, mill length 5.2 m (feed-end half supported by this pedestal).

Material inherits verbatim: concrete fc' 34.5 MPa; rebar ASTM A615 Grade 60 (Fy 414 MPa); soil subgrade modulus 60 MPa (hard-rock site). Anchor bolts are ASTM F1554 Grade 55 typical for mill foundations.

Loads inherit verbatim: LC1 static bearing vertical 6,130 kN centered on bearing seat; LC2 drive-torque horizontal 1,550 kN at bearing seat; LC3 charge-cascading dynamic 400 kN vertical + 200 kN horizontal at 0.158 Hz; LC4 seismic ELF at 0.15 g on the 1,250 t mill mass.

Pass/fail criteria inherit verbatim from the original and apply at the assembly level: (R1) peak soil bearing pressure <= 500 kPa; (R2) max rebar DCR per ACI 318-19 <= 1.0 across all load cases; (R3) pedestal-top vertical velocity at 0.158 Hz <= 10 mm/s rms per DIN 4150-3 Class II; (R4) first natural frequency of the pedestal-soil system >= 3 Hz (separation ratio 10 from 0.158 Hz forcing); (R5) bearing-seat tilt under static loads <= 0.5 mm/m. Added assembly-level targets under fem_check_policy.assembled_only: anchor-bolt pullout/shear DCR and rebar-to-concrete bond development DCR must be reported; per-part stresses are reported for diagnostic purposes but do not gate pass/fail.

Thermal, fluid, radiation, and buckling analyses are not required. Vibration analysis is required for LC3 harmonic load. A mill-charge dynamics model outside the FEA is required to derive charge-cascading force amplitudes. Deliver STEP AP242 of the assembly with each body (concrete pedestal, each rebar mat, each stirrup run, each anchor bolt, bearing sole plate) as a distinct solid tagged with part_family (A..E) and instance_index, plus a foundation report listing bearing pressure, rebar DCR, pedestal-top vibration velocity, first natural frequency, bearing tilt, assembly mass, and anchor-bolt / rebar-bond DCR.
short_prompt:
Design the SME CN10 SAG-mill feed-end trunnion pedestal as a multi-part assembly (concrete pedestal body, longitudinal rebar mats, transverse stirrup/tie rebar, trunnion anchor bolts, bearing sole plate) for a 10.4 m x 5.2 m SAG mill.

Pedestal 5.0 m x 4.0 m x 3.0 m; concrete fc' 34.5 MPa; rebar ASTM A615 Grade 60 (Fy 414 MPa); subgrade modulus 60 MPa; anchor bolts ASTM F1554 Grade 55.

Load cases: LC1 static bearing vertical 6,130 kN; LC2 drive-torque horizontal 1,550 kN; LC3 charge-cascading dynamic 400 kN vertical + 200 kN horizontal at 0.158 Hz; LC4 seismic ELF 0.15 g on mill mass.

Pass/fail: peak soil bearing <= 500 kPa; rebar DCR <= 1.0 per ACI 318-19; pedestal-top vibration velocity <= 10 mm/s rms per DIN 4150-3 Class II; first natural frequency >= 3 Hz; bearing-seat tilt <= 0.5 mm/m; FEM at assembled level; anchor + rebar-bond DCR <= 1.0.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Charge cascading force amplitudes on SAG mill trunnions are derived from mill-charge ballistic models (Morrell/Powell), not from structural FEA.

prompt.title: 10.4 m SAG mill feed-end trunnion pedestal (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Multi-part RC trunnion pedestal for 10.4 m x 5.2 m SAG mill: concrete block (A) + rebar mats (B) + stirrups (C) + anchor bolts (D) + bearing sole plate (E). 5.0 x 4.0 x 3.0 m. 6.13 MN static vertical + 1.55 MN horizontal + 400/200 kN dynamic at 0.158 Hz + seismic 0.15 g. Verified at assembly level: bearing <= 500 kPa, ACI DCR <= 1.0, velocity <= 10 mm/s, first freq >= 3 Hz, tilt <= 0.5 mm/m, anchor/bond DCR <= 1.0.

parts.name: concrete_pedestal_body
parts.role: 5.0 x 4.0 x 3.0 m RC block; primary mass and stiffness for mill-trunnion bearing support; carries 6.13 MN vertical + 1.55 MN horizontal + dynamic charge forces into the soil

parts.name: longitudinal_rebar_mat
parts.role: ASTM A615 Grade 60 longitudinal rebar mat in top/bottom faces (and optional side faces); provides flexural reinforcement against bearing-seat moment and seismic overturning

parts.name: transverse_stirrup_tie
parts.role: transverse stirrups/ties confining the rebar mat and providing shear reinforcement under the 1.55 MN drive-torque reaction

parts.name: trunnion_anchor_bolt
parts.role: anchor bolt assembly at the trunnion bearing footprint; transmits 6.13 MN vertical + 1.55 MN horizontal + 400/200 kN dynamic forces into the pedestal
parts.count_note: typical SAG-mill trunnion sole plate uses 12-24 anchor bolts per manufacturer spec

parts.name: bearing_sole_plate
parts.role: steel sole plate or grouted leveling pad between the trunnion bearing and the pedestal top; distributes bearing base footprint load and establishes the 0.5 mm/m tilt reference
parts.material_hint: ASTM A572 Gr 50 plate + non-shrink grout

assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: pedestal coordinates: +x along 5.0 m length, +y along 4.0 m width, +z up from bottom

boundary_conditions.soil: Winkler bed with subgrade modulus 60 MPa per hard-rock site

objective.primary: pass all static + dynamic limits under assembled_only FEM check

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: ACI 318-19 Chapter 17 anchor-to-concrete + Chapter 25 rebar development DCR

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: solid concrete with embedded rebar, Winkler soil

interfaces.load_path: rebar-to-concrete bond along the longitudinal mat; develops flexural tension reinforcement
stirrup tied to longitudinal bars; confines concrete and carries shear reinforcement
cast-in anchor bolts embedded in the pedestal top; transmit bearing forces via pullout and shear
grouted leveling pad / steel sole plate interface; distributes bearing base footprint into pedestal top
anchor bolts through the bearing sole plate clamp the trunnion bearing to the pedestal

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: RC mill pedestals are cast concrete + rebar + anchor-bolt assemblies; the multipart sidecar formalizes that physical composition.
notes.speculation_caveats: Exact rebar size/spacing and anchor-bolt count are team-selected to satisfy ACI 318-19 and manufacturer trunnion bearing anchor pattern.
